message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title US029 - As Project Manager, I want to start a sprint.

actor "Project Manager" as PM

participant ": StartSprintRoute" as Route
participant ": StartSprintController" as Controller
participant ": StartSprintService" as Service
participant "dto : SprintDTO" as DTO
participant ": Project" as Project
participant ": SprintDomainService" as DomainService
participant ": SprintStore" as SprintStore
participant ": ResourceStore" as ResourceStore

PM -> Route : Asks to start a Sprint
activate Route
Route -> Controller : startSprint(sprintDTO)
activate Controller
Controller -> Service : startSprint(sprintDTO)
activate Service

Service -> Project : getProjectTeam()
activate Project
Service <-- Project : projectTeam
deactivate Project

Service -> DTO : getSprintDuration()
activate DTO
Service <-- DTO : sprintDuration
deactivate DTO

Service -> DomainService : startSprint(dto.projectID, dto.sprintID, dto.startDate,\n projectTeam, sprintDuration)
activate DomainService

DomainService -> SprintStore : findAllSprintByProjectID (projectID)
activate SprintStore
DomainService <-- SprintStore
deactivate SprintStore

DomainService -> SprintStore : findSprintByID (sprintID)
activate SprintStore
DomainService <-- SprintStore
deactivate SprintStore

DomainService -> DomainService : validateStartDate(startDate)
activate DomainService
DomainService --> DomainService : true
deactivate DomainService

DomainService -> ResourceStore : validateProjectTeam(startDate, sprintDuration)
activate ResourceStore

ResourceStore -> ResourceStore : getProductOwnerByStartDate(startDate, sprintDuration)
activate ResourceStore
deactivate ResourceStore

ResourceStore -> ResourceStore : getScrumMasterByStartDate(startDate, sprintDuration)
activate ResourceStore
deactivate ResourceStore

DomainService <-- ResourceStore : true
deactivate ResourceStore

DomainService -> SprintStore : setStartDate(startDate)
activate SprintStore
deactivate SprintStore

Service <-- DomainService : true
deactivate DomainService

Controller <-- Service : true
deactivate Service

Route <-- Controller : true
deactivate Controller

PM <-- Route : Informs Operation Success
deactivate Route

@enduml
```
